BP 344: Accessibility Law

Sports Facilities

Game Mode
  • Benches: Min. Depth & Max. Depth
  • Benches: Min. Length & Seat Height
  • Benches: Vertical & Horizontal Force Strength
  • Back Support for Benches Not Located Next to a Wall
  • Team Player Seating Areas: Min. Dimensions
  • Exercise Equipment and Machines: Min. Clear Floor Space
  • Shooting Facilities: Min. Number of Accessible Fixed Firing
  • Shooting Facilities: Min. Dimension & Max. Slope
  • Bowling Lanes: Min. Number of Accessible Lanes
Code Reference

E. SPECIAL TYPES OF FACILITIES
3.6 Bowling Lanes
At least 5 percent, but not less than one, of the total number of bowling lanes shall be accessible. Unlike other areas of sport activity, only those team or player seating areas that serve accessible lanes shall be connected with an accessible route and comply with seating requirements.
